## Chunking Protocol (Scripts Over 700 Characters)

Audio quality degrades on long text. ElevenLabs docs recommend under 800 characters.


## Direct API Usage (Without Script)

For quick generations without the full QC pipeline:

```python
import urllib.request, json

script = "Your text here"
payload = json.dumps({
    "text": script,
    "model_id": "eleven_multilingual_v2",
    "voice_settings": {
        "stability": 0.55,
        "similarity_boost": 0.75,
        "style": 0.0,
        "use_speaker_boost": True
    }
}).encode()

req = urllib.request.Request(
    "https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech/FaqEcpH1etobBPMBMfJg",
    data=payload, method="POST"
)
req.add_header("xi-api-key", "YOUR_KEY")
req.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json")

resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120)
with open("output.mp3", "wb") as f:
    f.write(resp.read())
```


## Troubleshooting

| Problem | Fix |
|---------|-----|
| Voice sounds different | You're on wrong model. MUST be `eleven_multilingual_v2` |
| Stutters / extra sounds | Style is above 0. Set to 0.0 |
| Distorted / metallic | Similarity too high. Drop to 0.75 |
| Words garbled at end | Script too long. Enable chunking (under 700 chars per chunk) |
| Trailing weird noise | Trim last 0.4s with ffmpeg |
| Tone shifts between chunks | Use context seeding (prepend last sentence of previous chunk) |
| Contractions mispronounced | Expand them: "don't" â†’ "do not" |
| Numbers read wrong | Write them out: "12" â†’ "twelve" |
| Em-dashes cause pauses | Replace with commas |
| ALL CAPS sounds weird | Convert to normal case |
